title: Performance issue with Data Grid due to incorrect binding
symptom: The Data Grid displays a performance issue message and the editor becomes slow or crashes. This occurs when too many records are loaded at once.
applies_when: Binding to the entire collection object
not_this_if: Binding to the paginated data of the collection
root_cause: Binding to the entire collection object instead of the paginated data causes all records to load at once, leading to performance degradation and potential crashes in the editor.
fix_steps: Ensure pagination is set up correctly with the Paginator element
agent_instruction: Bind the Data Grid to 'Companies-01.data' to load only the paginated records.
